app.name: EstateAbly
app.tagline: The digital factbook for real estate

auth.reset_help: Enter your account email. We will send you a reset link.
auth.reset_sent_body: If an account exists for this email, a reset link is on its way. Check your spam folder too.
auth.verify_sent_body: We have sent you a confirmation link. Click it to activate your account.
auth.password_too_short: Password must be at least 6 characters.

invite.title: Accept invitation
invite.joining: You were invited to join workspace "{workspace}" as {role}.
invite.login_required: Please sign in first to accept the invitation.
invite.invalid_or_used: This invitation is invalid or has already been used.

settings.title: Settings
settings.tax_rate_help: Applied flat to the tax effect in the cashflow calculation.
settings.default_depreciation_help: Used for properties without their own rate.
settings.tenant_score_help: Each factor is multiplied by its weight. All equal (= 1) yields the classic average. Weight 0 excludes a factor.
settings.weights_all_zero: At least one factor must have a weight > 0.
settings.cashflow_convention_help: Controls how income and Hausgeld are labelled in the cashflow tool. Economically identical — labelling only.
settings.default_management_help: Default management cost per unit. Overridable per property or per snapshot.
settings.bank_maintenance_help: Conservative maintenance allowance (typically 7–12 €/m²) — bank view only, on top of the reserve.

owners.title: Owners
owners.name: Name
owners.kind_person_help: A single individual. First and last name are captured separately.
owners.kind_group_help: An ownership community (e.g. spouses) — members are linked after saving.
owners.no_members: No members yet. Add persons below.
owners.no_more_persons: All existing persons are already members. Create more persons first.

portfolios.title: Portfolios
portfolios.name: Name
portfolios.intro: Portfolios group a selection of your properties — e.g. by region, strategy or buyer. A property may belong to multiple portfolios, and for each portfolio you can generate a dedicated factbook (PDF).
portfolios.empty: No portfolios yet. Create one to group properties.
portfolios.no_candidates: All existing properties are already in this portfolio.
portfolios.confirm_remove: Really remove the property from this portfolio? (The property itself stays.)
portfolios.confirm_delete: Really delete this portfolio? The assigned properties themselves stay.
portfolios.duplicate_portfolio_name: A portfolio with this name already exists.

connect.title: Stripe Connect
connect.intro: Become a seller on the platform: onboard your workspace as a Stripe Connected Account, create products and accept payments directly. You can also subscribe to the platform plan.
connect.create_account_help: Create a Stripe connected account so your workspace can accept payments. You'll then be guided through Stripe's hosted KYC onboarding.
connect.platform_sub_help: Your workspace can subscribe to a platform plan — we charge it against your connected account's Stripe balance.
connect.products_help: Products you sell via your connected account. The storefront is publicly accessible.
connect.products_empty: No products yet. Add your first one.
connect.test_mode_note: Stripe test mode active. Live payments require live API keys.

simulations.title: Simulations
simulations.intro: Run what-if scenarios on a single property — rent growth, cost growth, refinancing at a different rate, or additional investments. Each simulation compares the scenario against today's status quo.
simulations.empty: No simulations yet. Create one to project a what-if trajectory.
simulations.name: Name
simulations.rent_growth_help: Cold rent grows by this rate each year (compound).
simulations.cost_growth_help: Hausgeld, maintenance, management & reserve grow compound.
simulations.interest_change_help: Applies from the year after rate_lock_until. 100 bps = +1 pp. Negative = rates drop.
simulations.duplicate_simulation_name: A simulation with this name already exists in this workspace.
simulations.no_baseline_help: The projection needs at least one cashflow snapshot and the workspace settings for this property. Create a snapshot first under the property's "Cashflow" tab.
simulations.no_projection_help: Projection is empty — the property has no transfer date yet (depreciation start year not known).
simulations.chart_title: Result after tax — Scenario vs. Status Quo
simulations.investments_help: Investments that exist only in this simulation — e.g. a planned renovation in 2028. The real investments from the property tab are still considered; these here are added on top.

properties.title: Properties
properties.parent_property_help: If this unit is part of a house, select the house here — otherwise leave empty.
properties.funding_cost_help: Informational — deductible expense, not part of acquisition cost or cashflow calculation.
properties.value_split_help: Land + building must total 100 % / the purchase price.
properties.depreciation_rate_help: Linear building depreciation rate. Acts as the linear component of the AfA method chosen on the AfA tab. Method (linear / declining / § 7b) and additional items (kitchen, furniture, …) are maintained there and add to this base.
properties.owners_share_help: Sum of all shares must equal exactly 100 %.
properties.owners_no_owners: No owners in this workspace yet. Create owners first.
properties.owners_duplicate: An owner can only be assigned once.

loans.title: Loans
loans.first_rate_note: Interest & principal shift every month — interest decreases, principal grows. Initial values:

tenants.title: Tenant
tenants.empty_list: No tenants on file yet. Create one directly under the property's "Tenant" tab.
tenants.name: Name
tenants.cold_rent_help: Contractual cold rent per month. Together with ancillary costs it forms the gross rent used in the cashflow snapshot.
tenants.ancillary_costs_help: Monthly advance ancillary-cost payment the tenant pays in addition to the cold rent. Gross rent = cold rent + ancillary costs.
tenants.single_tenant_help: Exactly one tenancy per unit. Multi-family houses: create the MFH as kind "house" and each unit as a separate property with the house as its parent — each unit gets its own tenant.
tenants.multi_tenant_help: Multiple lease contracts per property are supported (e.g. flatshares or successor tenants with overlap). The gross rent in cashflow is the sum of cold rents from all currently active contracts.
tenants.empty_property: No lease contract for this property yet.

valuation.title: Valuation
valuation.no_sqm_warning: Living area missing — multiplier value cannot be calculated.
valuation.no_land_value_warning: Land value missing — reproduction cost incomplete.
valuation.method_footnote: Methodology: (a) GRM value = sqm × market rent €/m² × 12 × multiplier (the quick rule of thumb used by brokers and banks). (b) Reproduction cost new = land value + building value (simplified, without age deduction). (c) Market value = weighted average of both. Indication for internal use (e.g. bank conversations) — not a certified appraisal.
valuation.weighting_help: Share of GRM vs. reproduction cost in the combined market value.
valuation.help_market_rent: Local comparison rent €/m² (rent index, listing comparison, expert estimate) — NOT the actually-collected rent.
valuation.help_multiple: Gross rent multiplier: market value ≈ multiplier × annual gross cold rent. Typical range 18–30, depending on location and condition. Rule of thumb of the broker market — not a net-yield factor in the ImmoWertV sense.
valuation.help_building_value: Reproduction cost of ONLY the building (replacement-cost-new, simplified). Land value is captured separately below — both together yield the replacement cost.
valuation.land_value_input_help: Current market value of the land at the valuation date. Land values change over time — editable per valuation. Empty = property master-data value is used.
valuation.source_footnote: This app delivers a market value indication based on GRM and reproduction cost new. Not an ImmoWertV-conformant appraisal, not an official valuation report — for bank/tax purposes consider adding a certified expert appraisal.

pnl.hausgeld_mode_help: You can either capture Hausgeld as a single total or split it into recoverable (heating, water, waste, …) and non-recoverable (management, insurance, …) — not both. The split matters only for tax reporting; the cashflow saldo is identical either way.
pnl.hausgeld_total_help: Full Hausgeld including recoverable parts — the reserve goes separately below.
pnl.investor_include_maw_label: Include vacancy reserve ({value} p.a.) — by default only in the bank view
pnl.projection_help: Projection based on the latest cashflow entry: same rent, Hausgeld and reserve over the years — interest/principal shift per the amortization schedule, depreciation follows the chosen method. The two rightmost columns show two views: "Result after tax" = book view (with depreciation, no principal), "Cashflow after tax" = liquidity view (with principal, no depreciation). Hover the "?" icons for details.
pnl.tax_section_help: Depreciation and the tax effect are not cashflow items in the strict sense — depreciation is non-cash, the tax effect is the actual tax you owe. Principal and reserve are part of the cashflow above but do NOT reduce the tax base.
pnl.view_investor_help: With personal tax effect — your own yield calculation.
pnl.view_bank_help: Pre-tax with vacancy reserve, conservative maintenance allowance and management — how a bank underwrites.
pnl.convention_hint_net: Default: cold rent only as income; the recoverable share passes through.
pnl.convention_hint_gross: Cold rent plus recoverable HG counts as income; the full HG goes to the expense side.
pnl.vacancy_amount_help: Empty = settings default × cold rent (e.g. 2 % residential, 4 % commercial).
pnl.management_costs_help: External or imputed management. Empty = settings default.
pnl.bank_maintenance_help: Conservative per-m² allowance — additional to the reserve, bank view only.
pnl.kpi_ltv_help: Remaining loans ÷ current market value (latest valuation).
pnl.stress_label: Stress test (+250 bp after rate lock)
pnl.stress_help: Increases interest by 250 bp once the rate lock ends — typical bank worst-case.
pnl.stress_no_lock: No rate lock end date set — stress applies from period start.
pnl.title: Cashflow
pnl.section_inputs: Inputs — leave override fields blank to let the app compute the value automatically from loans / depreciation.
pnl.cold_rent_from_tenant_help: Cold rent is taken automatically from the configured tenant — edit it there. This keeps cashflow snapshots and the tenant record in sync.
pnl.cold_rent_no_tenant: No tenant configured yet — cold rent is € 0 in this snapshot.
pnl.cold_rent_no_tenant_help: Add a tenant in the property's "Tenant" tab — the snapshot will then automatically use that cold rent.
pnl.pretax_profit_help: Rent − interest − tax-deductible costs (non-recoverable Hausgeld, management) − depreciation − investment deduction. Principal & reserves are NOT included (not tax-deductible).
pnl.tax_effect_help: Taxable result × tax rate. Display sign: positive = refund, negative = tax payment.
pnl.after_tax_cashflow_help: Liquidity view: actual cash flow including principal − tax effect. Answers: "How much is left on the bank account at year end?". Formula: pre-tax cashflow (with principal) − tax effect.
pnl.after_tax_result_help: Book view: taxable result − tax effect = taxable result × (1 − tax rate). Answers: "How much value remains after tax?". Includes depreciation, excludes principal.
pnl.duplicate_period: An entry for this period already exists. Edit it or adjust the period.
pnl.hausgeld_sum_invalid: Recoverable + non-recoverable ancillary costs must equal the total.

afa.title: Depreciation
afa.method_vs_rate_help: How it fits together: the depreciation rate on the property-edit form is the linear share for the building. Here you only pick the method (linear / declining § 7 V / § 7b special). § 7b special additionally uses the linear rate from settings (typically 3 %). The additional items below (kitchen, furniture, …) ADD on top — they do not replace the building rate.
afa.method_linear_help: Same amount each year = basis × rate. Default for existing buildings; typical rate 2 %.
afa.method_degressive_7v_help: Only for new residential buildings with construction start between 01.10.2023 and 30.09.2029. 5 % p.a. on the remaining book value.
afa.method_sonder_7b_help: Special depreciation for eligible new rental housing: extra 5 % p.a. in the first 4 years on top of straight-line (typically 3 %).
afa.start_year_help: Year in which year 1 of the depreciation runs. Empty = derived from transfer date.
afa.sonder_basis_limit_help: Optional cap on the § 7b basis (subsidy ceiling). Empty = full depreciation basis.
afa.schedule_footnote: Modelling only — not a tax ruling. § 7b is simplified (eligibility not enforced).
afa.no_basis: No basis (purchase price and building share / land value missing)
afa.basis_from_ancillary: Building share of ancillary acquisition costs
afa.basis_footnote: Per § 7 EStG, ancillary acquisition costs (real-estate transfer tax, broker, notary, land registry) are split between building and land in the same ratio as the purchase price. Only the building share is depreciable. Funding costs are immediately deductible (Werbungskosten, § 9 EStG) and not capitalised.

investments.title: Investments
investments.type_fixed_common_reserve: Fixed measure on common property — from reserve
investments.type_fixed_common_levy: Fixed measure on common property — special levy
investments.type_optional_common_reserve: Optional measure on common property — from reserve
investments.type_optional_common_levy: Optional measure on common property — special levy
investments.measure_type_help: Who economically bears the measure (individual property, reserve, special levy). Tax treatment is selected separately below.
investments.tax_expense_immediate_help: Classic maintenance expense — fully deductible in the year of payment. Beware of the 15 % rule: within the first 3 years after acquisition the tax authority may force this into acquisition cost (§ 6 (1) no. 1a EStG).
investments.tax_expense_82b_help: Larger maintenance can optionally be spread over 2–5 years to smooth tax progression.
investments.tax_capitalized_building_help: Production / subsequent acquisition cost: increases the depreciation basis and follows the building method (linear / §7V / §7b) over the remaining useful life.
investments.tax_capitalized_separate_help: Standalone asset (e.g. fitted kitchen, wallbox) — own useful life in years.
investments.tax_non_deductible_help: Privately caused or not legally deductible — pure cash outflow, no tax effect.
investments.expense_82b_years_help: Number of years over which the cost is spread equally (§ 82b EStDV allows 2–5).
investments.useful_life_years_help: Years over which the item is depreciated. Examples: fitted kitchen 10, wallbox 8.
investments.anschaffungsnah_warn_body: Within the first 3 years after acquisition, maintenance expense must not exceed 15 % of the building acquisition cost — otherwise ALL measures in that window are mandatorily reclassified as subsequent acquisition costs and depreciated over the building's remaining useful life.
investments.anschaffungsnah_status_warn: Warning: > 80 % of threshold. Review before further measures.
investments.anschaffungsnah_requalify_cta: Reclassify all expense entries in the window to building depreciation
investments.anschaffungsnah_no_transfer_date: Property transfer date missing — 15 % check not possible.
investments.anschaffungsnah_no_basis: Building acquisition cost unknown — 15 % check not possible.

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.no_transfer_dates: No transfer dates ("Übergang Nutzen & Lasten") recorded yet.
portfolio.balance_chart_title: Acquisition · remaining debt · equity per property
portfolio.weighted_note: Values weighted by ownership share. Properties without owner at end.

billing.needs_quantity_upgrade: Heads up: you have {count} properties but only {current} are subscribed. Premium features are temporarily locked — please upgrade the quantity.
billing.checkout_success: Thanks! Your subscription is now active.
billing.active_subscription_help: {tier}: {qty} properties — {price} per year. Manage payment method, invoices and cancellation in the Stripe portal.
billing.subscribe_intro: Pick the maximum number of properties you want to cover. Stripe handles the tier pricing automatically. You can increase the quantity any time later.
billing.subscribe_footnote: When you add another property, you can bump the quantity in one click — Stripe charges the prorated difference.
billing.test_mode_note: Stripe test mode active. Live payments require live API keys.
billing.choice_dialog_intro: From the 2nd property on you either need a premium subscription (with all features) or you give up the premium features. What do you want to do?
billing.choice_premium_help: Stripe checkout with quantity selection. All features (factbook, portfolio, cashflow, simulation) remain available.
billing.choice_free_help: Property is created, but factbook, portfolio, cashflow and simulation are locked. You can upgrade any time later.
billing.upgrade_dialog_intro: You have {current} properties subscribed but want to create {needed}. Should we increase the quantity?
billing.upgrade_dialog_proration_note: Stripe immediately invoices the prorated difference.
billing.lock_reason_no_subscription: You have {count} properties — premium features are subscription-only from the 2nd property on.
billing.lock_reason_quantity_upgrade: You have {count} properties, only {current} subscribed. Please bump the quantity in billing.

errors.invalid_percent: Invalid percent value: "{value}". Please enter a number (e.g. "2.5").
